era: 1984-1987. Proto-Grunge/Punk. E=7 -- raw, heavy, the basement from which grunge was built. Capitol Hill. Sub Pop.
associated_musicians: Mother Love Bone / Pearl Jam (Stone Gossard + Jeff Ament)

theory_nodes.concept: Green River split 1987: most consequential event in Seattle rock. Mark Arm + Steve Turner formed Mudhoney. Stone Gossard + Jeff Ament joined Andrew Wood in Mother Love Bone. The chain runs directly to Pearl Jam's Ten (1991). One split created two of the most important bands in American rock.
theory_nodes.description: The split that created Pearl Jam and Mudhoney.

theory_nodes.concept: Deep Six (1986, C/Z Records): founding document of Seattle grunge. Six bands (Green River, Melvins, Soundgarden, Skin Yard, U-Men, Malfunkshun). Jack Endino at Reciprocal Recording. Green River and Malfunkshun both in engine at consecutive degrees because both on Deep Six.
theory_nodes.description: Deep Six 1986: the founding document. Green River is in it.

theory_nodes.concept: First Sub Pop release: 'Come On Down' (1985) among Sub Pop's earliest releases. Green River at the literal origin of the label. Dry as a Bone EP (1987) establishes the Sub Pop production template: Jack Endino, Reciprocal Recording, the drum sound and guitar distortion that defines the era.
theory_nodes.description: Green River at Sub Pop's origin. First release. Template established.

theory_nodes.concept: Creative fault line: Arm/Turner (punk idealism, Sub Pop aesthetic) vs. Gossard/Ament (rock ambition, major label trajectory). The tension produces two fully realized outcomes: Mudhoney and Mother Love Bone. Both more complete in their separate forms than the combined band could have been.
theory_nodes.description: The productive disagreement that generated the split.

cross_references.relationship: The Sub Pop wave Swallow represents is what Green River's foundation enabled. Swallow opens the arc; Green River is the arc's true origin.
Deep Six companion. Andrew Wood's band. Gossard + Ament left Green River to join Wood in Mother Love Bone. The two Deep Six bands are consecutive engine entries.
Gossard + Ament from Green River joined Wood from Malfunkshun. MLB is the direct consequence of Green River's split. The chain runs through 294-295-296 to Pearl Jam.
Cornell's tribute to Andrew Wood, assembled from MLB survivors + the soon-to-be Pearl Jam. Green River 294 is the origin event of the chain that produced ToD.
Layne Staley + Mike McCready (Pearl Jam, from the GR/MLB/Pearl Jam lineage). Second-generation cross-reference.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=7 (Green River) + E=6 (Tufted Puffin) = E=13. Two firsts at the same degree: THE proto-grunge origin band and FIRST ALCIDAE in engine.

milestones: SPLIT CREATED PEARL JAM AND MUDHONEY
